memories.content:
# Typescript Compile Fixes & System Diagnostics Walkthrough (antigravity) ended with status imported.
Working directory: C:/Users/hyper/.gemini/antigravity/brain/e88bac4f-e064-4c4b-bf5f-17f3373dac43
Log tail: --- | ## 3. Cleared Corrupted uv Package Cache | - **Issue**: A corrupted python dependency class with invalid syntax (`from .._exceptions import ConnectError, ConnectTimeout, etc.`) inside `httpx` default transport layer crashed the downstream `windows-mcp` service. | - **Resolution**: Ran `uv cache clean` and systematically deleted the entire cached `archive-v0` folder inside `AppData\Local\uv\cache\`. | - **Result**: `uv` successfully fetched and installed clean, official PyPI wheels, eliminating the invalid Python syntax crashes permanently. | ## 4. Final Verification | - **Build Status**: `pnpm -C packages/core exec tsc --noEmit` exits with `0` (100% clean compilation). | - **Tool Suite Status**: Running `test_mcp_server.mjs` executes status lookups, directory listings, and JIT diagnostics immediately and flawlessly with zero hangs!

structuredSessionSummary.name: # Typescript Compile Fixes & System Diagnostics Walkthrough
logTail: - **Issue**: A corrupted python dependency class with invalid syntax (`from .._exceptions import ConnectError, ConnectTimeout, etc.`) inside `httpx` default transport layer crashed the downstream `windows-mcp` service.
- **Resolution**: Ran `uv cache clean` and systematically deleted the entire cached `archive-v0` folder inside `AppData\Local\uv\cache\`.
- **Result**: `uv` successfully fetched and installed clean, official PyPI wheels, eliminating the invalid Python syntax crashes permanently.
- **Build Status**: `pnpm -C packages/core exec tsc --noEmit` exits with `0` (100% clean compilation).
- **Tool Suite Status**: Running `test_mcp_server.mjs` executes status lookups, directory listings, and JIT diagnostics immediately and flawlessly with zero hangs!

structuredSessionSummary.name: # Implementation Plan - Ingest & Dedup MCP Server Catalog and Sessions/Memories
logTail: - Scan `imported_session_memories` and `web_memories` to identify duplicate memory fragments (same session, matching content/type).
- Clean up duplicates to streamline model context storage.
- Check tables storing saved scripts or prompts and clean up duplicates if any are found.
- Run the python script safely using the environment python adapter.
- Verify total row counts in `published_mcp_servers`, `imported_sessions`, and `imported_session_memories` before and after the run.
